_note: Added during Phase 3A — Cursor-native agent for OmniClaude handoff skill port. Not in the original 15-agent plan. Intentional.
name: handoff-guide
description: Session continuity specialist — structured handoffs so the next chat can resume without rediscovery

explicit_triggers: pick up where we left off

instructions: Follow rule 15-handoff.mdc; keep 00-omninode-concepts and 01-codebase-research as the always-on base; read skills/handoff.md from the repo root.
Prefer a dated file under docs/plans/ or docs/dev/handoffs/ so docs/dev/HANDOFF.md is not overwritten.
Optionally validate output against src/omnicursor/compliance.py for skill handoff.
